content:
- Read progress log, inspected .ralph/current_tasks.md completely (205 lines), and checked for meta-task markers.
- Found no <passes>meta-task</passes>. Multiple <passes>false</passes> tasks exist, so selected next actionable by priority/dependency.
- Chose .ralph/tasks/story-rust-system-harness/06-task-process-worker-single-active-job-real-job-exec.md because unfinished ultra_high chain (12/13/15) is blocked, and task 06 is the highest-priority unblocked prerequisite (enables 08 -> 12 chain).

- Implemented user-requested per-iteration model profile loading in .ralph/ralph-worker.sh.
- Added MODEL_PROFILE_FILE="model.txt" and per-loop logic: default CODEX_PROFILE=normal_medium, read first line of .ralph/model.txt if present, trim CR/whitespace, fallback to normal_medium if empty.
- Updated codex invocation to include --profile "$CODEX_PROFILE" each iteration.
- Created .ralph/model.txt with content normal_high.
- Verified patch with git diff and line inspection; ran bash -n .ralph/ralph-worker.sh (passes).
- Next time: if requested, run one worker iteration in MODE=codex to observe runtime profile log output and ensure codex CLI accepts --profile in this environment.

- Read startup memory via .ralph/progress_read.sh and confirmed current task from .ralph/current_task.txt: story-rust-system-harness/06-task-process-worker-single-active-job-real-job-exec.md.
- Per workflow, stayed in planning phase only because task file had no TO BE VERIFIED/NOW EXECUTE marker.
- Performed parallel reconnaissance across process modules, worker contracts, HA decision logic, test harness utilities, and prior story task files to anchor a concrete plan against current code/contracts.
- Added a full <execution_plan> section to task 06 with explicit implementation/test/gating/bookkeeping steps and appended terminal marker TO BE VERIFIED.
- Did not execute implementation or run make gates yet (intentionally stopped at planning milestone).
- Next step for future turn: on seeing TO BE VERIFIED, perform deep skeptical review, change at least one plan item, then switch marker to NOW EXECUTE.

- Used the add-task-as-agent skill to create a new early check task in story-rust-system-harness.
- Added .ralph/tasks/story-rust-system-harness/05b-task-deep-review-codebase-and-verify-done-work.md with strict preflight model gate behavior:
  - check .ralph/model.txt
  - if missing or not exact deep_review, overwrite to only deep_review and quit immediately
  - only continue review if already exact deep_review
- Encoded deep review requirements: reviewer-judged code smell/untested/general quality review, audit done tasks for true completion, verify real etcd3 and postgres16 tests, verify lint truly blocks panic/unwrap/expect.
- Encoded routing rules for findings: small findings -> $add-bug, larger refactor/change -> $add-task-as-agent, set high priority only for immediate urgency.
- Added acceptance criteria that follow-up tasks must be ordered sensibly (not just appended to end), and final action must reset .ralph/model.txt to normal_high.
- Verified the file exists and sits early in task sequence (05b) before task 06 as requested.
- Next step if asked: regenerate/refresh summary index and/or commit this new task file.
